dosingInfo.rawDosageText: 2 DOSAGE AND ADMINISTRATION Valproic acid is intended for oral administration. ( 2.1 ) Simple and Complex Absence Seizures: Start at 10 to 15 mg/kg/day, increasing at 1 week intervals by 5 to 10 mg/kg/week until seizure control or limiting side effects ( 2.1 ) Safety of doses above 60 mg/kg/day is not established ( 2.1 , 2.2 ) 2.1 Epilepsy Valproic acid is intended for oral administration. Patients should be informed to take valproic acid every day as prescribed. If a dose is missed it should be
